ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., VFA1951) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of the season (e.g., Regular, Finals, Pre-season) */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the match belongs to */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the season (e.g., Round 10) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., RegularSeason, Finals) */,
  "ground_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ground where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the match */,
  "victor_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the match */,
  "margin" INTEGER /* Margin by which the match was won */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., Completed, Postponed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_ground_id FOREIGN KEY ("ground_id") REFERENCES grounds ("ground_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_victor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("victor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grounds" (
  "ground_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground */,
  "ground_name" TEXT /* Name of the ground (e.g., Williamstown Cricket Ground) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the ground (e.g., Williamstown, Victoria, Australia) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the ground in terms of spectators */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the ground */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the ground was established */,
  "last_renovated" TEXT /* Date of the last renovation */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the ground owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ground_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "current_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "total_players" INTEGER /* Total number of players in the team */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins in the current season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses in the current season */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws in the current season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_teams" (
  "match_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-team relationship */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "team_role" TEXT /* Role of the team in the match (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the match */,
  "team_margin" INTEGER /* Margin by which the team won or lost */,
  "team_position" TEXT /* Position of the team at the end of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_teams_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was born */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "position_detail" TEXT /* Detailed position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender) */,
  "total_goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "total_behinds" INTEGER /* Total behinds scored by the player */,
  "total_matches_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_players" (
  "match_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-player relationship */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "player_role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the match (e.g., Starter, Sub) */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "behinds" INTEGER /* Number of behinds scored by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Whether the player was injured during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., Injury, Foul) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the incident occurred (e.g., 25:00) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the incident (if applicable) */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who reported the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is responsible for */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was appointed */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date the coach departed (if applicable) */,
  "current" INTEGER /* Whether the coach is currently active */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins during the coach's tenure */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses during the coach's tenure */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws during the coach's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "behinds_for" INTEGER /* Number of behinds scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored against the team */,
  "behinds_against" INTEGER /* Number of behinds scored against the team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "team_position" TEXT /* Position of the team at the end of the season */,
  "team_margin" INTEGER /* Margin by which the team won or lost */,
  "team_shots" INTEGER /* Total number of shots taken by the team */,
  "team_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_by_play" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., Kick, Pass, Mark) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the play occurred (e.g., 25:00) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the play (if applicable) */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., Goal, Behind, Miss) */,
  "assist_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who assisted in the play (if applicable) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the play was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_by_play_assist_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("assist_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
